---
title: "June 25 Video Lectures"
---

## Readings

- Alarid-Escudero F, et al. *A need for change! A coding framework for improving transparency in decision modeling.* Pharmacoeconomics (2019).
  <https://doi.org/10.1007/s40273-019-00837-x>

- Alarid-Escudero F, et al. *An introductory tutorial on cohort state-transition models in R...* Medical Decision Making (2022).
  <https://doi.org/10.1177/0272989X221103163>


**Right click below links and select “Open link in new tab”.

### Decision trees   

<div style="padding:56.25% 0 0 0;position:relative;"><iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/504760041?h=3cfee965fe&amp;badge=0&amp;autopause=0&amp;player_id=0&amp;app_id=58479" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="Decision Tree"></iframe></div><script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>

### Matrix algebra for decision sciences sciences (optional: recommended for those without matrix algebra background)   
<div style="padding:56.25% 0 0 0;position:relative;"><iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/506504682?h=3ff78ac63f&amp;badge=0&amp;autopause=0&amp;player_id=0&amp;app_id=58479" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="Matrix algebra for decision sciences"></iframe></div><script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>

### Cohort State-Transition Models:
#### STM 1: Introduction   

<div style="padding:56.25% 0 0 0;position:relative;"><iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/474550894?h=f090f42dbe&amp;badge=0&amp;autopause=0&amp;player_id=0&amp;app_id=58479" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="STM 1: Introduction"></iframe></div><script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>

#### STM 2: Overview   

<div style="padding:54.06% 0 0 0;position:relative;"><iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/474550940?h=f56df95c06&amp;badge=0&amp;autopause=0&amp;player_id=0&amp;app_id=58479" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="STM 2: Overview"></iframe></div><script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>

#### STM 3: Simple 3-State Example   

<div style="padding:56.25% 0 0 0;position:relative;"><iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/474551568?h=a27c4f3716&amp;badge=0&amp;autopause=0&amp;player_id=0&amp;app_id=58479" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="STM 3: Simple 3-State Example"></iframe></div><script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>


#### STM 4: Outcomes   

<div style="padding:56.25% 0 0 0;position:relative;"><iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/474553106?h=b3c028d047&amp;badge=0&amp;autopause=0&amp;player_id=0&amp;app_id=58479" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="STM 4: Outcomes"></iframe></div><script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>

#### STM 5: Time-Varying State-Transition Models
<div style="padding:56.25% 0 0 0;position:relative;"><iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/474560741?h=e0b3674579&amp;badge=0&amp;autopause=0&amp;player_id=0&amp;app_id=58479" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="STM 5: Time-Varying State-Transition Models"></iframe></div><script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>

#### DARTH framework-dampack
<div style="padding:62.5% 0 0 0;position:relative;"><iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/502987155?h=21385356ef&amp;badge=0&amp;autopause=0&amp;player_id=0&amp;app_id=58479" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;" title="DARTH framework - darthpack"></iframe></div><script src="https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js"></script>
